  "description": {
    "fullDescription": "Spacious 2 bedroom, 1 bathroom apartment available in the heart of Downtown Jersey City—just a 5-minute walk to Grove Street PATH station, perfect for an easy NYC commute!\n\nHighlights:\n• 2 bedrooms with closets\n• Private balcony\n• 1 full bathroom\n• Utilities included in rent\n• Near Grove St, Van Vorst Park, Hospital, Newark Ave, and more.\n• Convenient access to PATH, buses, restaurants, cafes, and shops\n\nRent: $2600/month (utilities included) - (Negotiable)\nLocation: Downtown Jersey City – Grove Street area\n\nPerfect for roommates, small families, or professionals looking for a prime location with easy transportation.\n\nAVAILABLE FROM\n21 Apr 2026\nACCOMODATES\n3\nPOSTED BY\namjad\nROOM TYPE\nApartment\nEXPECTED RENT\n$2,600 /Month\nBEDROOMS\n2 Beds\nBATHROOMS\n1 Bath\nAREA\n750 sqft\nSTAY TYPE\nLong/Short Term\nACCOMODATION TYPE\nAffordable Apartments\nDEPOSIT\n$2,600",
